scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:cv-analyzer"
scripts.dev:cv-analyzer:detached: start "AIR-CV" /MIN cmd /c "set CV_NLP_MAX_CHARS=9000 && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn api:app --app-dir analyse-cv --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001"
